metadata.name: Student Locked Out of Dorm Room

description: A student has left their key inside their dorm room and is locked out.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and verify their room assignment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student's identity and that they live in the specified room.

nodes.task_description: Contact the Resident Advisor (RA) on duty for that building to let the student in.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully contacts the RA and provides the student's details.

nodes.task_description: Inform the student that the RA is on their way to assist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the resolution to the student.
